events.label: reasoning
events.text:
我们被要求评估PPE选择，场景是呼吸器错误滤盒颜色（ID）。在制造或装配车间，标准工作，质量检查。PPE选择是安全与索具范围。工作阶段是rough-complete。参考是NFPA 70E和OSHA 1910 Subpart I。

任务：判断是否符合适用法规、规范、图纸或制造商要求。

输出JSON：decision应是pass/fail/needs_more_info。呼吸器错误滤盒颜色，这显然是不合规的。滤盒颜色通常代表不同类型防护（如有机蒸气、酸性气体、颗粒物等）。如果使用错误滤盒，可能对危害无效，因此不符合OSHA 1910.134（呼吸防护）要求。OSHA要求雇主建立并维护呼吸防护计划，并选择正确滤盒。NFPA 70E涉及电气安全，可能涉及电弧防护，但这里似乎不直接相关。但场景明确说了参考NFPA 70E，但PPE选择可能涉及电弧防护？不过滤盒颜色错误更可能是化学防护问题。但无论怎样，错误滤盒不符合制造商要求，可能违反OSHA。决策应为fail。风险：使用错误滤盒可能导致暴露于有害物质，风险高或关键？可能为High。工作阶段：rough-complete。组件条件：installed-defective（滤盒安装错误）和non-compliant。percent_complete：可能是80%？但不确定。value：0，没要求。confidence：高，0.9。事件时间：无。rate：无。order：无。workable：无。findings：呼吸器滤盒颜色错误，表明可能选用了不匹配危害的滤盒。actions：立即停止使用，更换正确滤盒，重新培训。rationale：错误滤盒无法防护实际危害，违反OSHA 1910.134。references：OSHA 1910.134, NFPA 70E? NFPA 70E主要是电气安全，可能不直接适用。但参考材料有NFPA 70E，也许在电气环境中滤盒可能用于防电弧？不过电弧不涉及滤盒。因此可能还是OSHA 1910.134。我们可以写OSHA 1910 Subpart I（个人防护装备）和1910.134。所以references: ["OSHA 1910.134", "OSHA 1910 Subpart I"].

输出到/app/answer.json。

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Respirator cartridge color does not match the hazard identified for the work area"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately remove the respirator from service",
    "Identify the correct cartridge for the actual respiratory hazard",
    "Install manufacturer-approved cartridge with correct color coding",
    "Re-train worker on cartridge selection and hazard assessment"
  ],
  "rationale": "Using a respirator with the wrong cartridge (indicated by incorrect color ID) fails to provide adequate protection against the specific airborne hazards present. This violates OSHA 1910.134(d)(1)(i) which requires the employer to select a respirator certified by NIOSH and appropriate for the hazard.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.134(d)(1)(i)",
    "OSHA 1910 Subpart I – Personal Protective Equipment"
  ]
}
